_meta.scope: per-country income inequality (OECD Income & Wealth Distribution Database, IDD)
_meta.description: OECD IDD inequality anchors: Gini of MARKET income (before taxes and transfers) and DISPOSABLE income (after taxes and transfers), plus the relative income poverty rate. The market-vs-disposable pair is the high-value addition: it gives the model a PRE-redistribution inequality anchor (the post-tax-only Eurostat Gini cannot identify the market capital-share elasticity beta - see STATE.md F12). Validation/identification anchor; does NOT enter core SFC calibration (mirrors the Epoch connector's role).
_meta.verify_live: Values are best-available published OECD IDD figures, rounded; confirm exact vintage and dimensions on the live DBnomics pull (provider OECD, IDD dataset) before trusting absolute levels. The market>disposable ordering is the robust, used invariant.
_meta.live_path: OECD IDD via DBnomics provider 'OECD' (dataset IDD): GINIB = Gini before taxes/transfers, GINI = Gini after, PVT5A/PR_INC = poverty rate. Dimensions firewalled from this sandbox; --probe on a networked machine to resolve, like the AMECO lowercase-geo fix.

candidates.note: CONFIRMED via --probe-dims 2026-06-14. INC_MRKT_GINI = Gini of MARKET income (before taxes & transfers); AGE=_T total population; DEFINITION D_CUR + METHODOLOGY METH2012 = current series (~2012+). relax_dims is the minimal fallback (REF_AREA+MEASURE+AGE) the connector auto-tries if the full filter returns nothing; the best-populated doc is then chosen and 0-100 values normalised to 0-1.

live_query.help: Run estimate_beta.py --probe-idd on a networked machine; it prints the dataset's real dimensions. Edit the matching candidate's 'dataset', 'geo_dim' and 'dims' (esp. the before-tax MEASURE code) here, then re-run --years to estimate the live within-country market-Gini beta.

gini_market_oecd.label: Gini of market income (before taxes & transfers)
gini_market_oecd.note: Pre-tax-pre-transfer Gini, total population. PRE-redistribution inequality anchor for beta identification + the distribution module's gini_market output.

gini_disp_oecd.label: Gini of disposable income (after taxes & transfers)
gini_disp_oecd.note: Post-tax-post-transfer Gini, total population. Cross-checks the Eurostat ilc_di12 gini_disp_income series from an independent source.

poverty_rate_oecd.label: Relative income poverty rate (50% of median)
poverty_rate_oecd.note: Share below 50% of median equivalised disposable income. Independent anchor for the distribution module's poverty floor.
